_comment: Host-shape e2e fixture: clis[] with requires_input (P1-A), entry condition (P1-B), category alias + name passthrough (catalog-tree compat). Loads with no consumer-specific engine code.

clis.name: Alpha CLI
clis.description: always installs; declares a required secret

clis.name: Beta CLI
clis.description: Linux-only; skipped via entry condition when OS_GATE != linux
